triage_rows.detail: Build a carried-inventory ledger first; the current wider sell shadow cannot bind without it.
Build explicit precedence for open/add protection and EOD reduce/close reconciliation before opening an isolated sell-side lane.
Do not open the isolated lane before the ledger and precedence policy exist as concrete surfaces.
Keep the next step sell-side only and continue excluding reentry execution and full replay binding.

interpretation: V1.34BY converts the holdings-ledger and precedence audits into the next binding direction.
The branch should build the ledger and precedence surfaces first, then revisit whether an isolated sell-side shadow lane is safe to open.
